---
name: Triage Bug
about: Describe this issue template's purpose here.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| **Date Reported:** | Date the customer reported the issue. |
| **Date/Time of Issue:** | Date/Time the issue occurred. |
| **Employee Name:** | Name of the person escalating the issue to development. |
| **Client - Contact Name:** | The contact at the client who raised the issue (MaxContact employee if not raised by a client directly) |
| **Client - Company:** | The client name, for non customer systems this should be N/A. |
| **System URL:** | The URL of the MaxContact system. |
| **Version:** | The version number the system is on at time of the issue being reported. |
| **What is the issue?** | Detail the overall issue at a high level. |
| **Has the issue occurred since a recent upgrade?** | Yes/No - This is important to understand if this has been caused due to a system upgrade. |
| **Has the system ever behaved in the way the client expects?** | It is important to understand as this will impact the wider impact of resolving the issue for the client. |
| **Has the system behaved in the way the client expects recently? (If yes - when?)** | It is important to understand if this has not worked as expected for a considerable period of time as this will impact the wider impact of resolving the issue for the client. |
| **What is the impact/severity of the issue to the client and why?** | What is the impact of this issue on the users of the system. |
| **Has this issue occurred on any other systems, if so please detail?:** | This provides an understanding of if this is unique to this customer or a wider issue. |
| **Are you able to replicate?:** | Can this be replicated, if this can, provide detail of what system and on what version. |
| **What are the replication steps?:** | Provide step by step journey of how to replicate the issue.<br>1.<br>2.<br>3. |
| **Has any steps been taken to resolve or work around the issue?:** | This provides additional context around what has been done to attempt to fix the issue and the current severity for the client. |
| **Are there any errors in the browser, if so please detail and please attach (Press F12):** | Errors provide key detail around what was occurring at the time of the issue. |
| **Do you have a screenshot and/or video of the issue?** | Visual evidence helps people see the problem. |
| **Have logs been attached to the ticket (All logs up to and including the time period):** | Logs provide key detail around what occurred before and at the time of the issue. These are specifically useful if an issue cannot be replicated. |
